name: Packit List
short_description: "Packit List" is a short, 3D organizing puzzle game that takes about an hour to complete. You will follow the wonderful adventures of Hana, a high school girl who travels across multiple worlds to organize various themed objects in a limited space
detailed_description:
Packit List is a light 3D organizing puzzle game that can be completed in about an hour. You will travel across multiple worlds, organizing various themed objects into a bag to progress through the story.


Hana is a high school student. She once had a best friend… until the friend passed away.
After losing the friend who was more important to her than herself, Hana loses courage to face the outside world.


Not knowing how to let go of a friend, Hana lived in sadness for a long time.
Then one day, she wakes up in a world that isn't her own.

Hana begins to travel through different worlds, organizing various bags along the way.
Join her as she fits various shaped items into her bag and embarks on a journey of packing and self-discovery.
How will this journey change her life?



  • Physics-based 3D puzzles: Solve puzzles by perfectly fitting objects into the suitcase.
  • Emotional story: A touching narrative about overcoming loss, the pain of grief, and the warmth of memories and friendship.
  • Explore diverse themed worlds: Travel to various worlds, including realms of magic and swords, or spy gadgets and espionage.
  • Charming pastel graphics: Experience a warm and comforting atmosphere with soft, pastel-colored visuals.
  • Beautiful soundtrack: Accompany Hana on her journey with a beautiful, original soundtrack that enhances the emotional depth of the game.



Packit List offers a brief yet gentle journey that can be completed within an hour.
While it may be a short experience, we hope that this journey with Hana helps you learn to say goodbye to something or someone you dearly miss.
